Uses of Class
com.onlinepayments.domain.NetworkTokenLinked

  • Packages that use NetworkTokenLinked 
    Package Description
    com.onlinepayments.domain  

    • Uses of NetworkTokenLinked in com.onlinepayments.domain

      Methods in com.onlinepayments.domain that return NetworkTokenLinked 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      NetworkTokenLinked TokenResponse.getNetworkTokenLinked()
      Object containing Network Token details, when the Network Token was created on behalf of the merchant and is activated.
      NetworkTokenLinked NetworkTokenLinked.withExpiryDate(String value)
      The expiry date of the network token.
      NetworkTokenLinked NetworkTokenLinked.withMaskedToken(String value)
      The masked Payment Token associated with the Card used for the purchase.
      NetworkTokenLinked NetworkTokenLinked.withTokenState(String value)
      Describes the state of the linked network token: requested - A Network Token has been requested from the scheme. denied - A Network Token request has been denied from the scheme. active - The linked Network Token is active and can be used for the subsequent payment in the payment series. suspended - The linked Network Token is suspended and can not be used for the subsequent payment in the payment series.
      Methods in com.onlinepayments.domain with parameters of type NetworkTokenLinked 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void TokenResponse.setNetworkTokenLinked(NetworkTokenLinked value)
      Object containing Network Token details, when the Network Token was created on behalf of the merchant and is activated.
      TokenResponse TokenResponse.withNetworkTokenLinked(NetworkTokenLinked value)
      Object containing Network Token details, when the Network Token was created on behalf of the merchant and is activated.
